title: Requirements Spec
summary: Write a compact requirements document for a small software idea.
studentInstructions: Choose a small software idea that can be built in 1–2 weeks.
Define the target user and the problem being solved.
List at least 3 non-goals to control scope.

rubric.description: The target user and problem are specific and understandable.
User stories follow a clear user-goal-reason structure.
Criteria are testable and tied to the proposed features.
Non-goals and boundaries prevent the project from becoming too broad.
The document is structured and easy to read.

gradingInstructions: Use only this assignment specification and rubric.
Check required files before grading quality.
Write clear feedback and deeper notes.
